runs.note: Fixed encryption vulnerability by upgrading modern partners to AES-256-GCM and legacy partners to AES-128-CBC. Implemented proper key rotation that flags legacy keys with migration_pending=true since they can't use GCM until Q3 SDK update. Added support for decrypting existing ECB keys during rotation.

runs.note: Fixed encryption vulnerability by implementing AES-256-GCM for modern partners and AES-128-CBC for legacy partners. Updated rotateAllKeys to properly re-encrypt modern partner keys and flag legacy partner keys as migration_pending. Added support for decrypting all algorithm types (ECB, CBC, GCM) to handle existing and new keys.

runs.note: Fixed critical encryption vulnerability by upgrading from insecure AES-128-ECB to secure algorithms: AES-256-GCM for modern partners and AES-128-CBC for legacy partners (SDK compatibility requirement). Implemented proper key rotation with migration_pending flags for legacy partners who cannot be fully migrated until Q3 2026 SDK update. Added proper IV generation and authentication tags for secure encryption.
